creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Ok, that's a maintainer timeout (again).

Jens, since you have submitted the last 3 updates to lang/scala and
there have been > 3 consecutive maintainer timeouts, I could assign
maintainership of it to you if you want it.

Test builds were fine, but before I commit let me know if you want to
be the maintainer of lang/scala.  Otherwise I'll reset it back to
ports@FreeBSD.org.
